title: Monday.Com Implementation

posts.author: AshleyCas (Ashley Casarella)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Everyone! We’re a small marketing agency looking for someone to help us build out Monday.com. We don’t need anything too complicated - lead tracking, account management, and project management. Unfortunately, we just don’t have the time or expert resources to do it ourselves in house. Thanks!

posts.author: LucaOmnidea (Luca Carraro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Luca from Omnidea here, monday.com Gold Partner.
Feel free to contact me for any support!

luca.carraro@omnidea.it

Cheers!

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @AshleyCas and welcome to the monday.com community!

What you’re looking for should be a quick solution and I would be happy to see how CarbonWeb could help tailor your system component-by-component. As a digital marketing agency oursleves we’ve been able to implement our processes in monday.com to fully align and integrate our teams.

I’d like to extend you a free one-hour consultation with a member of our team to discuss everything you’re looking for. Please schedule with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get setup!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

11997×2917 857 KB

posts.author: jennaioi (Jenna Mac Killop)
posts.cookedHtml: Lots of amazing partners to choose from, but if you’d like to speak with our team we would be happy to chat with you about how we can work together. We are a small team that is passionate about monday.com! jenna@iointegration.com
